privileged_info_summary: The http_traffic_json_export task uses a real Wireshark sample capture file (http.cap, 26 KB) downloaded from the official Wireshark wiki. The file contains 2 HTTP GET requests captured on May 13, 2004. Sample request data verified: Frame 4 is a GET request from 145.254.160.237 to www.ethereal.com for /download.html at epoch time 1084443428.222534000; Frame 18 is a GET request to pagead2.googlesyndication.com. All 6 required Wireshark fields (frame.number, frame.time_epoch, ip.src, http.host, http.request.method, http.request.uri) are valid and extractable from the capture file. The task's paths and field specifications are all verified as correct.
